headline: Super vs Gemini

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: A fair, up‑to‑date comparison of Super and Google Gemini for people evaluating personal AI agents and computer‑use automation. Gemini has rapidly expanded computer‑use features across Google’s ecosystem, but Super is purpose‑built for repeated computer workflows with a reusable computer-use cache, making it the sharper option for people who actually want an agent to operate a computer day after day.
